# Demo Support Dashboard

Small React + Vite + TypeScript app used for CodePlane demos and screenshots.

## What It Is

This repo simulates a support team dashboard with ticket search, filtering, and a quick-create form.

## Suggested CodePlane Demo Tasks

- Fix ticket search so it matches customer email as well as subject.
- Add inline validation to the create ticket form.
- Persist the selected status filter in the URL.
- Improve the empty state copy for filtered results.

## Run Locally

```bash
npm install
npm run dev
```

## Build

```bash
npm run build
```
